description: Pre-deploy gate — every feature must show passes:true before Frappe Cloud deploy

features.description: Operator can start a session on an available room
Operator can start a session on an available locker
Asset moves from Available to Occupied after session start
Operator can vacate an occupied asset
Asset moves from Occupied to Dirty after vacate
Operator can mark a dirty asset as clean
Asset moves from Dirty to Available after mark clean
Operator can set an asset to Out of Service
Operator can return an Out of Service asset to Available
Invalid transitions are rejected with a clear error message
Session number format is {d}-{m}-{y}---{NNN}
Session numbers increment correctly within a day
Session number sequence resets at midnight
Concurrent session starts produce unique numbers
Redis lock prevents double-assignment of the same asset
Lock contention returns a clear error to the second operator
Lock is released after successful operation
Lock is released after failed operation (no key leak)
Lock TTL expires after 15 seconds if not released
Asset Board displays all 59 assets grouped by tier
Asset card shows correct status color after each transition
Asset Board updates in real-time after a status change
Tier badges display correctly on asset cards
Out of Service assets are visually distinct
